texto: I’m nothing great. But I’m a rose… I’m a rose whether I’m admired or not, I’m a rose whether anyone’s crazy about me or not… Like I said, nothing great. Just a rose… But, do you know what it means to be a rose, my friend? Being a rose means ‘freedom.’ It means not existing by the praises of Others or not ceasing to exist by their disapproval.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Serdar Özkan: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a autoestima. O trecho “I’m nothing great. But I’m a rose… I’m a rose whether I’m admired or not, I’m a rose whether anyo…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que autoestima, inspiracional, self-acceptance pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e termino.
